---
title: "Talks"
format:
    html:
        theme: sketchy
---

[Go back](https://rjjanse.github.io#oo)

---

::: {layout-ncol=3}

[![Statistical Modelling](images/modelling.webp){width=253px height=189.85px}](https://rjjanse.github.io/talks/modelling){target="_blank"}

[![P(robabilities), E[xpectations], and the Truth](images/probability.png){width=253px height=189.85px}](https://rjjanse.github.io/talks/pet){target="_blank"}

[![Figuring It Out](images/cholera-map.jpg){width=253px height=189.85px}](https://rjjanse.github.io/talks/figures){target="_blank"}

[![Pseudo-observations](images/skutustathagigar.jpg){width=253px height=189.85px}](https://rjjanse.github.io/talks/pseudo-observations){target="_blank"}

:::
